title: cyperus fulvus
intro: Cyperus fulvus, also known as the golden papyrus sedge or yellow sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cyperus fulvus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be taken internally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
